_comment_nist_fields: Fields below follow IR 8278Ar1 Section 3.2 OLIR template
focal_document_element_description: Review capabilities of allocated collection assets.
reference_document_element_description: Maintain and optimize existing BI assets, including performance tuning, data model updates, and deprecation of unused content.
comments: DCWF task intersects with WIDAI AB domain. AB-T-007 is the strongest semantic match. Secondary: AB-K-007 (AB, cosine: 0.430), DQ-T-008 (DQ, cosine: 0.410).
_comment_widai_extensions: Fields below are WIDAI extensions per ADR-014

primary_method.name: Cross-Encoder STS
primary_method.description: Semantic Textual Similarity via cross-encoder regression trained on STS-Benchmark.
primary_method.significance: STS 3.0/10 (raw 0.300). Shared vocabulary: [assets]. DCWF-only terms [allocated, capabilities, collection, review] vs WIDAI-only terms [bi, content, data, deprecation, existing, maintain] define the semantic distance between the descriptions.

bertscore.significance: BERTScore F1=0.880 (P=0.901, R=0.861). P exceeds R by 0.040 — the DCWF element's 6 words are well-captured by the WIDAI KSA's 17 words, but the KSA contains additional specificity not reflected in the DCWF element.

nli_cross_encoder.significance: NLI: mixed signal (E:0.0%, N:53.1%, C:46.9%). No dominant classification for "Review capabilities of allocated collection assets." vs "Maintain and optimize existing BI assets, including performance tuning, data mod" — the relationship is genuinely ambiguous from a logical inference perspective.

biencoder_cosine.description: Bi-encoder sentence embeddings with cosine similarity.
biencoder_cosine.significance: Bi-encoder 0.432 > STS 0.300 (gap +0.133). Independent encoding finds more similarity than cross-attention. Shared surface terms [assets] inflate the bi-encoder, but cross-attention detects semantic divergence beneath the vocabulary overlap.

jaccard_token.description: Token-level Jaccard similarity (intersection/union of lowercased word tokens).
jaccard_token.significance: Jaccard 10.0%. Shared tokens: [assets]. DCWF-only: [allocated, capabilities, collection, review]. WIDAI-only: [bi, content, data, deprecation, existing, maintain].

signals.detail: Bi-encoder/STS gap 0.133 suggests some vocabulary-driven inflation in candidate selection.
